case_title: MORRIS DAVID E. VS SAFETY NET (FORMERLY JUSTICE ENTERPRISES)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $53.00 FILED BY MORRIS DAVID E. AS TO DEFENDANT SAFETY NET (FORMERLY JUSTICE ENTERPRISES) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-1993 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
